content_fingerprint: a new community guide walks jax users through writing custom gpu kernels with pallas a hands on tutorial published on the hugging face blog teaches python developers who already know jax how to write custom gpu and tpu kernels using google s pallas framework aiming to close a practical learning gap in the jax ecosystem aritra roy gosthipaty published a community guide on the hugging face blog titled pallas for people who know jax but not kernels yet offering a beginner oriented introduction to writing custom kernels for gpus and tpus using pallas the low level numerical computing extension wit
